setup_context.description: Caller context JSON: {mode:'create'|'edit', description:string, source_dir?:string}. SKILL.md exports CREATE_WORKFLOW_CONTEXT before invoking setup-workflow.sh; description is the user's original natural-language request (setup-workflow.sh has no positional slot for it).

optional.description: Create-vs-edit mode hint (and source dir for edit)

required.description: Approved design: suffix, target dir, stage decomposition, transition graph, inputs per stage

optional.description: Validator report from the previous iteration — every ❌ line must be addressed in this pass

required.description: Writer report — absolute path to the workflow directory and list of files produced
